prompt:
github-relay PR #5 merged (commit 1e3d132 on patflynn/github-relay main: `module: use stdenv.hostPlatform.system instead of deprecated pkgs.system`). The local wrapper added in this PR is now obsolete — remove it and bump the flake.lock to pick up the upstream fix.

**Two changes to make on this PR's branch (`agent/20260518-1817-ce168fce`):**

1. **Bump `flake.lock` for the `github-relay` input:**
   ```
   nix flake lock --update-input github-relay
   ```
   This should advance the `github-relay` node in `flake.lock` to commit `1e3d132` (or `7d019e9`, the merge commit) on `patflynn/github-relay` main.

2. **Restore the simple import in `hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix`.** Replace the multi-line wrapper block (the `(moduleArgs@{ pkgs, ... }: inputs.github-relay.nixosModules.default ...)` lambda plus the explanatory comment above it) with the original one-liner:
   ```nix
   inputs.github-relay.nixosModules.default
   ```
   Look at the current state of `hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix` around lines 17-37 in this branch (you can see the wrapper added in this PR — the diff is in commit `aaf62e9`). Drop the entire wrapper, leaving only the bare `inputs.github-relay.nixosModules.default` import in the imports list. Keep the rest of the imports list unchanged.

**Validation (critical — run all three):**
- `nix flake check --all-systems` — passes
- `nixos-rebuild build --flake .#classic-laddie 2>&1 | grep 'evaluation warning'` — returns NO matches (this is the key check; the wrapper-removal should still leave zero eval warnings because the upstream fix removes the root cause)
- `nixos-rebuild build --flake .#classic-laddie` — succeeds

If any eval warning re-appears, do NOT push — instead investigate whether the flake.lock actually advanced to the fixed commit (compare `flake.lock`'s github-relay `rev` against `1e3d132` / `7d019e9`).

**Commit message:** "github-relay: bump flake.lock and drop pkgs.system wrapper\n\nUpstream patflynn/github-relay#5 merged the deprecation fix, so the local wrapper added earlier in this PR is no longer needed."

**Update the PR description** to reflect that warning #2 is now fixed by the upstream bump rather than the wrapper, and drop the trailing checklist item about "reviewer to follow up with a one-line fix in patflynn/github-relay" since it's done. Keep the rest of the description (warnings #1, #3, #4 are still fixed by the original commits in this PR).

**Out of scope:** do not touch any other flake inputs, do not address other unrelated warnings, do not change anything outside flake.lock + hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix + the PR description.
